title: Love in the City
director: Michelangelo Antonioni, Federico Fellini, Alberto Lattuada
writer: Aldo Buzzi, Luigi Chiarini, Luigi Malerba
actors: Rita Josa, Rosanna Carta, Enrico Pelliccia
plot: Six separate episodes: would-be suicides discuss their despair. A provincial dance hall. An investigative reporter posing as a husband-to-be. A young unwed mother. Girl-watching techniques of Italian men. A glimpse into prostitution.
